_publications._publicationTitle: Longitudinal phenotype development in a minipig model of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Weight was not statistically significantly different between NF1+/ex42del and wildtype minipigs at any of the three study time points (4, 8 and 12 months of age).
details: Weight was not statistically significantly different between NF1+/ex42del and wildtype minipigs at 4, 8 and 12 months of age
